meaning: n.(官员等的)否认本领,推诿于不知情的本事
examples: If the untruth focuses on someone else, this gives more plausible deniability.
They like to maintain some kind of plausible deniability, not necessarily be tied to spectacular terrorist plots.
So the main research direction of us is that how to assure the "non-deniability" and "non-traceability" in such complex environment.
When the deal fails to close both parties have plausible deniability for misleading the sales rep.
As a practical matter, however, Murdoch and Ailes seem to be wavering in their commitment to plausible deniability.
